Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
APPEARANCE: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. 922-5939 specially appearing for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied for failure to provide a proof of service. Ruling was without prejudice. Counsel's request for a 30 day continuance was denied. (301/PJB/ju) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
